---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for the platform.
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Describe the Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this fits into the modular monolith design.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockup wireframes, or diagrams about the feature request here.
